meta.description: Receives the edited scene mapping from parts-mapper.html, rewrites the GLB scene node names, uploads the result as a new product version, and stores the final mapping as a JSON attachment.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'GLB rewritten and uploaded as new version', productUuid: $node['Store Final Mapping'].json.productUuid, productName: $node['Store Final Mapping'].json.productName, renameCount: $node['Store Final Mapping'].json.renameCount }) }}
